message: bpf_xdp_load_bytes is asked to write fourteen bytes into a ten-byte stack buffer
required_proof: the helper length passed in R4 must not exceed the initialized stack buffer range passed in R3

related_spans.label: the stack scratch buffer has room for exactly ten bytes
later logic depends on the ten-byte probe contents

evidence.detail: invalid write to stack R3 off=-10 size=14
bpf_xdp_load_bytes writes len bytes into the stack destination argument

help: Pass `PROBE_BYTES` or `sizeof(buf)` as the helper length so the helper write fits in the stack buffer.
Keep the helper-based XDP byte-load path and the marker check; bypassing bpf_xdp_load_bytes is not an equivalent xdp-tools probe repair.
